author: taratorio
content: <@412614104222531604> I checked `prysm-erigon-1` and `teku-erigon-1`. They are stuck in initial sync with 0 peers in the EL. Looks like this is because the bootnodes list that they have been started with has outdated bootnodes (3 out of 6). Also looks like the other 2 out of 6 are up to date Nethermind ones but apparently Nethermind runs only on `discv4`? Erigon is `discv5` only by default now. Etherex seems to be running both `discv4` and `discv5`. I think for devnets we should be explicitly running only `discv5` and no `discv4` at all.

author: barnabasbusa
content: Lighthouse and Nimbus still missing proposer preferences!

author: parithosh
content:
The consensus spec test releases now have compliance tests as a part of the release: https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/releases/download/v1.7.0-alpha.10/comptests.tar.gz

This should make it easier to know what spec you are passing for compliance tests.
(the release will go out and the compliance tests will get added after the fact, this is to prevent blocking the entire release on the slow compliance test generation)
